
> sentry@0.0.0 knip:prod /home/runner/work/knip/knip/sentry
> pnpm run knip --production --exclude dependencies --reporter compact --no-exit-code


> sentry@0.0.0 knip /home/runner/work/knip/knip/sentry
> knip --treat-config-hints-as-errors --production --exclude dependencies --reporter compact --no-exit-code
